CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4

PART_D_LIPS_25 
LABEL: 
Part D Low Income Premium Subsidy 25% 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the dollar amount of the monthly Part D low-income total premium subsidy (LIPS) for 
beneficiaries at the 25% subsidized level. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: PART_D_LIPS_25 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
—
